a:r.a:t: Continuous Naval Assurance Control Plane - API concept
Every promoted E3D/Hull revision re-evaluates only affected naval-architecture scenarios, then publishes explainable margins, evidence and approval state in the user PLM.
captured -> affected -> calculated -> explained -> approved -> learned
Promoted revision or baseline emits a typed event with hull, block, option and date effectivity.
Find affected compartments, loading cases, rules, downstream objects and previous evidence.
Execute only affected scenarios; preserve certified solver results and provenance.
Explain margin erosion; rank counterfactual options across safety, weight, cost, buildability and operations.
Publish signed results, rule trace, affected objects, evidence pack and release decision.
Compare design assumptions with live draught, tank, trim and performance data; feed learning back.

AI prioritizes, explains and proposes; certified solvers calculate; the naval architect and class authority make the release decision. This is how the platform moves faster without weakening assurance.
Official-source basis: NAPA naval architecture + Node Network + OCX; AVEVA E3D Design + CONNECT + PI System official product pages. Concept architecture is a proposed AVEVA-based PLM extension.
